name: Flow: https://cleanmymac.com
goal: Walk through the purchase flow from landing page to checkout. Stop before submitting payment.

steps.label: Pricing Page
steps.description: CleanMyMac pricing page showing Basic ($3.35/month) and Plus ($5.45/month) annual subscription plans for 1 device.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Click the Buy Now button on the Basic plan to proceed to checkout

steps.label: Checkout Details Form
steps.description: Order summary page showing CleanMyMac Basic Annual subscription for $40.20 with form fields for email, country, and ZIP code.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Filling in the email address field with the disposable email

steps.label: Checkout Details Form
steps.description: Order summary page showing CleanMyMac Basic Annual for $40.20 with email, country, and ZIP/Postcode fields to fill.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Filling in the ZIP/Postcode field with a valid US zip code

steps.label: Checkout Details Form
steps.description: A checkout form requesting email address, country, and ZIP/postcode with an order summary showing CleanMyMac Basic Annual subscription for $40.20.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Click the Continue button to proceed to the payment form

steps.label: Payment Form
steps.description: A checkout payment form showing order summary for CleanMyMac Basic Annual subscription with card number input field, PayPal option, and payment details fields.
steps.title: Choose the right CleanMyMac subscription plan

next_action.description: Stopping as we have reached the payment form with card number input field. The goal was to walk through purchase flow and stop before submitting payment.
